top_signals.title: Flight Firm CAE Says Defense Deals, Cost Cutting to Drive Profit Surge
top_signals.summary: Flight simulator firm CAE Inc. unveiled a plan to increase operating income by 30% or more by 2030 as its new chief executive officer embarks on a strategy that includes a greater focus on defense clients.
